text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Hm? Ah… It's just you. 
I thought you were another fan.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
There's a surprising number of my fans here. 
Or I guess, fans of my modeling.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Gotta say, though… Having to smile through 
those conversations is high-key tiring.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Well, I don't have to do all that in front of you… I can be the real me.
